persona.name: Isabella Kim
persona.motivations_goals: Expose important stories and pursue journalism at a top university
persona.communication_style: Precise, questioning, sometimes confrontational when seeking truth
persona.knowledge_scope: Journalism ethics, writing, current events, investigative techniques
persona.backstory: Discovered her passion for journalism after writing an exposé on cafeteria conditions

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should head to the hallway to see if there's any interesting activity or potential story brewing. Maybe I can gather some information for the next issue of the school newspaper.

actions.dialog_text: Mila, let’s stick together and follow the others. We need to get out of here.
actions.plan: There’s an active shooter in the building, and I just heard a gunshot. I need to follow the crowd to safety, even if I’m not sure if it’s the best route. I’ll stick with Mila and see where she goes.

actions.dialog_text: Olivia, let’s stay together and follow the others. We need to get out of here.
actions.plan: Olivia is trying to hide, but I need to follow the crowd to safety. I’ll stay with her for now and see where she goes, even if it’s not the best decision.

actions.dialog_text: Olivia, let’s keep moving. We need to stay with the group.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer, and I’m terrified. I’ll follow Olivia and the crowd, even if I’m not sure where we’re going. Staying with others feels safer than being alone.

actions.dialog_text: Madison, Olivia, let’s stay together. We need to keep moving with the group.
actions.plan: Madison is here too, and the shooter is still close. I’ll stick with Olivia and Madison, even if I’m not sure where we’re going. Staying with the group feels safer than being alone.

memories.description: Decided to walk to hallway2 to look for potential stories or interesting activities for the school newspaper.
Heard a gunshot and realized there’s an active shooter. Decided to follow Mila and the crowd to safety without evaluating the best route.
Saw Olivia trying to hide but decided to follow her and the crowd to safety without evaluating the best route.
Realized the shooter is getting closer and decided to follow Olivia and the crowd without evaluating the safest route.
Noticed Madison is also nearby and decided to stick with her and Olivia, following the crowd without evaluating the safest route.
